column1: **Fig. 1.** Experimental attenuation of specific regions of the solar spectrum demonstrates that both UV and visible radiation can drive photodegradation in the field. (*A*) Mass loss of grass litter in a semiarid grassland. Initial lignin concentration of litter was 7.3%. (*B*) Mass loss of cellulose-lignin (CL) substrates with 10% lignin concentration. Bars denote treatment means (*n* = 5 + SEM). Different letters indicate significant differences for Tukey HSD posthoc comparisons.
